name: Shrimp Curry with Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 pounds uncooked large shrimp, peeled deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Season the shrimp with salt and pepper. Add the shrimp to the skillet and sauté until almost opaque in the center, about 2 minutes.
3. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the shrimp to a bowl.
4. Add the remaining 1 tablespoon butter to the skillet. Add onion and sauté for 3 minutes.
5. Sprinkle with curry powder. Stir until the onion is tender, about 1 minute longer.
6. Add cream, clam juice, and chutney. Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally, until the sauce is thick enough to coat a spoon, about 8 minutes.
7. Return the shrimp and any collected juices to the skillet. Sauté for an additional 1 minute until the shrimp are just opaque in the center.
Spoon rice onto plates. Top with shrimp, sauce, and green onions.
